emails.subject: European Trading Meeting
emails.body: European Trading Meeting Jeff, I just wanted to check whether the Trading Meeting was actually taking place today (Justin wondered whether it would be cancelled as you have the All-Employee Meeting). Hope you are well. Kind regards, Nicola

emails.subject: RE: European Trading Meeting
emails.body: RE: European Trading Meeting Nicola: In follow-up to our telephone conversation, today's meeting is cancelled. Could you advise everyone at your end? The next meeting will be 2 weeks from today. Thanks, Jeff To: Hodge, Jeffrey T.
